scripts.db:demo: pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed && pnpm embed:demo
scripts.embed:demo: uv run python -m tcgscan_worker embed:catalog --game pokemon && uv run python -m tcgscan_worker embed:catalog --game mtg && uv run python -m tcgscan_worker embed:catalog --game yugioh && uv run python -m tcgscan_worker embed:catalog --game lorcana && uv run python -m tcgscan_worker embed:catalog --game one_piece
scripts.catalog:all: uv run python -m tcgscan_worker ingest:catalog --game pokemon && uv run python -m tcgscan_worker ingest:catalog --game mtg && uv run python -m tcgscan_worker ingest:catalog --game yugioh && uv run python -m tcgscan_worker ingest:catalog --game lorcana && uv run python -m tcgscan_worker ingest:catalog --game one_piece && uv run python -m tcgscan_worker ingest:catalog --game sports
